meta.title: Safety Gate Monitor for Shopify
meta.description: Safety Gate Monitor checks Shopify products against EU Safety Gate / RAPEX, shows status inside Shopify Admin, and monitors new alerts against your catalog.

hero.title: Check Shopify products against EU Safety Gate inside Shopify Admin.
hero.lede: Safety Gate Monitor compares your catalog with EU Safety Gate / RAPEX records using product text, brand, model, category, and available images, then surfaces the result where your team already works.
points: Shows product safety status directly on Shopify product detail pages
Runs on product create, update, manual checks, and monitoring runs
Uses per-shop thresholds and keeps alerts actionable with resolve and dismiss flows

preview.label: Shopify Admin
preview.productSubtitle: Safety Gate status visible on the product page
preview.alert: Potential match with a recalled toy alert in EU Safety Gate.
preview.action: Suggested action: review the match, contact the supplier, or keep the product blocked.

items.title: See status on the product page
items.body: Your team gets the latest Safety Gate status, risk context, and recommendation directly inside Shopify Admin product details.

items.title: Monitor new alerts against saved products
items.body: The app stores checked products and compares them against newly imported Safety Gate alerts, so monitoring can focus on what changed.

items.title: Keep the alert queue usable
items.body: Set a similarity threshold per shop and review matches with resolve and dismiss actions instead of leaving alerts as raw noise.

signals.title: Built for a real Shopify admin workflow, not a generic alert browser.

workflow.title: Three steps, tied to the current product workflow.

steps.title: Import fresh Safety Gate alerts
steps.body: The backend regularly imports new EU Safety Gate records and keeps them ready for retrieval and matching.

steps.title: Check products when work happens
steps.body: Checks run from product create and update webhooks, manual checks, and Shopify Admin product actions, with image-aware matching when images are available.

steps.title: Review, resolve, dismiss, and rerun monitoring
steps.body: Merchants see match context in admin screens, can triage alerts, and can run monitoring against newer Safety Gate records without starting from zero each time.

footer.title: Turn Safety Gate checks into an operational Shopify workflow.

cta.title: Install the app and start checking products in Shopify Admin.
cta.body: Enter your myshopify.com domain to start the install flow.
cta.label: Shop domain

risk.title: A safety issue can cost more than one sale.

items.title: Fines and enforcement risk
items.body: Dangerous products can lead to regulatory scrutiny, forced removals, customer claims, and expensive operational cleanup.

items.title: Trust loss is harder to recover
items.body: Customers may forgive a shipping delay. They rarely forget a product safety problem tied to your store.
